Field Summary
static int ePermAll
          Grant all permissions.
static int ePermAnnotate
          Allow annotations.
static int ePermAssemble
          Allow document assembly.
static int ePermCopy
          Allow content copying or extraction.
static int ePermDigitalPrint
          Allow high resolution printing.
static int ePermFillForms
          Allow filling of form fields.
static int ePermModify
          Allow changing the document.
static int ePermNoEncryption
          Do not apply encryption.
static int ePermNone
           
static int ePermPrint
          Allow low resolution printing.
static int ePermSupportDisabilities
          Allow support for disabilities.

Field Detail

ePermNoEncryption

public static final int ePermNoEncryption
Do not apply encryption. This enumeration shall not be combined with another enumeration. When using this enumeration set both passwords to an empty string or null.
